---
title: "Ben Jaques-Leslie"
about:
  image: images/IMG_7196.jpeg
  template: jolla
---

This website belongs to Ben Jaques-Leslie. Ben is a husband and dad of three boys, living in Minneapolis, Minnesota. He is a data scientist and evaluator whose career has spanned international development, federal workforce programs, public assistance, and state government. He is currently a Results Coordinator at Minnesota Management and Budget, where he works at the intersection of program evaluation and performance management.

## Education

**University of California, San Diego** | San Diego, CA\
MPIA in International Development | 2008 – 2010

**University of North Carolina** | Chapel Hill, NC\
B.S. in Mathematics | 2000 – 2002

## Experience

**Minnesota Management and Budget** | Results Coordinator | May 2025 – Present

**US Office of Personnel Management** | Program Evaluator | November 2023 – February 2025

**US General Services Administration** | Data Scientist | November 2022 – September 2023

**Minnesota Department of Human Services** | Research Scientist | August 2016 – November 2023

**Abdul Latif Jameel Poverty Action Lab at MIT** | Senior Research and Training Manager | June 2010 – July 2016
